plugin.name: Scan for Mobile Access
plugin.description: Create a controlled QR-code mobile access entry for N.E.K.O through Cloudflare, Tailscale, or cpolar.
plugin.short_description: Create a QR-code mobile access entry for N.E.K.O.
panel.toast.manualMobileMode: The phone has opened the page. To avoid keeping the desktop main page and phone page open at the same time, switch to mobile mode manually from the system tray menu.
panel.toast.starting: Starting mobile sharing. Getting the public link may take a moment.
panel.title: Scan for Mobile Access
panel.subtitle: Temporarily create a controlled mobile browser entry.
panel.warning.public: Public access is enabled. Share it only with trusted devices and stop it when finished.
panel.warning.cache: Cache note: this temporary public link may change to a new address each time sharing restarts. Your mobile browser may treat the new address as a new site and download resources again. If storage grows after use, clear the related temporary site's cache or site data in the mobile browser settings.
panel.cloudflare.otherRunning: Another access method is currently running. Stop it before starting the Cloudflare temporary tunnel.
panel.tabs.label: Access method
panel.tailscale.title: Tailscale Funnel
panel.tailscale.description: For users who already have Tailscale installed and signed in. It can provide a stable HTTPS entry through Tailscale's public gateway.
panel.tailscale.installGuide: Tailscale was not detected. Install and sign in to Tailscale, then return here and check again.
panel.tailscale.loginGuide: Tailscale was detected, but sign-in was not confirmed. Open Tailscale, sign in, and enable MagicDNS, HTTPS, and Funnel.
panel.tailscale.readyGuide: Tailscale sign-in was detected. After Funnel requirements are ready, start Funnel here to get a QR code and link.
panel.tailscale.prepareNote: The plugin does not install Tailscale or change account/access-control settings. After setup, you can start Funnel here.
panel.tailscale.toast.starting: Starting Tailscale Funnel. Getting the public link may take a moment.
panel.tailscale.toast.policyCopyFailed: Template copy failed. Copy the code block manually.
panel.tailscale.otherRunning: Another access method is currently running. Stop it before starting Tailscale Funnel.
panel.tailscale.guideIntro: This method needs some Tailscale setup first. After setup, the plugin can start the local mobile gateway and generate a QR code and access link through Tailscale Funnel.
panel.tailscale.guide.install.title: Install and sign in
panel.tailscale.guide.install.body: Open the official download, install Tailscale, sign in from the system tray, and confirm this computer appears in your device list.
panel.tailscale.guide.install.image: Image area: official download page and signed-in tray status
panel.tailscale.guide.prerequisites.body: In the Tailscale admin DNS page, confirm MagicDNS is enabled. It is usually enabled by default; turn it on only if it is disabled. Then enable HTTPS certificates. Funnel needs these settings to create a reachable HTTPS domain.
panel.tailscale.guide.prerequisites.imag: Image area: MagicDNS and HTTPS toggles on the DNS page
panel.tailscale.guide.funnel.title: Allow Funnel
panel.tailscale.guide.funnel.body: Open the JSON editor, select all existing content, copy the full template, paste it as the replacement, and save. Note: this overwrites custom rules, so use it only if you are still on the default template or have not customized access controls.
panel.tailscale.guide.funnel.image: Image area: select all in the JSON editor and replace it with the full template
panel.tailscale.guide.check.title: Check in the plugin
panel.tailscale.guide.check.body: After setup, make sure this plugin is running, then return here and check again to confirm installation, account, and device DNS. When the check passes, start Funnel and the panel will show a QR code and copyable access link.
panel.tailscale.guide.check.image: Image area: successful status cards in the plugin
panel.cpolar.title: cpolar China Tunnel
panel.cpolar.description: For users who prefer China-friendly routing. Install cpolar and configure an auth token first; the plugin then uses cpolar to create an HTTPS scan-to-access entry.
panel.cpolar.installGuide: cpolar was not detected. Install the Windows client, then return here and check again.
panel.cpolar.authGuide: cpolar was detected, but no auth token was found. Sign in to the cpolar dashboard, copy your token, and save it locally as shown in the guide.
panel.cpolar.readyGuide: cpolar and an auth token were detected. Start cpolar here to get a QR code and link.
panel.cpolar.prepareNote: The plugin does not install cpolar or read/show your token. It only checks whether the config exists and starts its own temporary cpolar process.
panel.cpolar.limitNote: The free plan usually uses random addresses and 1Mbps bandwidth, with limited simultaneous online processes. Startup may fail if another cpolar process is already running.
panel.cpolar.toast.starting: Starting cpolar. Getting the HTTPS link may take a moment.
panel.cpolar.otherRunning: Another access method is currently running. Stop it before starting cpolar.
panel.cpolar.guideIntro: This method needs cpolar installed and an auth token configured first. After setup, the plugin can start the local mobile gateway and generate a QR code and access link through cpolar.
panel.cpolar.guide.install.title: Install cpolar
panel.cpolar.guide.install.body: Open the official download, then download and install the Windows client. After installation, return here and click Check Installation so the plugin can check automatically.
panel.cpolar.guide.install.image: Image area: cpolar download page and post-install status check
panel.cpolar.guide.auth.title: Configure auth token
panel.cpolar.guide.auth.body: Open the token page, copy your auth token, paste it into the field below, and click Save Token. The plugin will write it to the default config file automatically.
panel.cpolar.guide.auth.image: Image area: dashboard token page and token save field in the plugin
panel.cpolar.guide.auth.placeholder: Paste the token copied from cpolar
panel.cpolar.guide.check.title: Check in the plugin
panel.cpolar.guide.check.body: After setup, make sure this plugin is running, then return here and check again. When the check passes, start cpolar and the panel will show a QR code and copyable access link.
panel.cpolar.guide.check.image: Image area: successful status cards in the plugin
panel.share.description: Starting creates a temporary HTTPS link and QR code. After confirmation, it opens the native project page.
panel.confirm.stop: Stop the current public mobile access entry?
panel.toast.copyFailed: Copy failed. Show the link and copy it manually.
panel.details.title: Connection Details
panel.details.note: After confirmation, the browser enters the native project page and adapts to mobile screen size automatically.
actions.start.label: Start Sharing
actions.stop.label: Stop Sharing
actions.stop.confirm: Stop the current public mobile access entry?
actions.rotate.label: Rotate QR Code
entries.start.name: Start Mobile Sharing
entries.start.description: Start the local mobile gateway and generate a QR-code access link.
entries.stop.name: Stop Mobile Sharing
entries.stop.description: Stop the temporary public link and the local mobile gateway.
entries.rotate.name: Rotate QR Code
entries.rotate.description: Reset the access token so the old QR code immediately becomes invalid.
entries.status.name: Get Sharing Status
entries.status.description: Get the current mobile QR tunnel status.
entries.vendor.name: Check Bundled cloudflared
entries.vendor.description: Check whether the bundled cloudflared.exe and license records exist.
entries.tailscale.name: Check Tailscale
entries.tailscale.description: Check whether Tailscale is installed and signed in for the Funnel route.
entries.tailscaleStart.name: Start Tailscale Funnel
entries.tailscaleStart.description: Start the local mobile gateway and generate a public link through Tailscale Funnel.
entries.cpolar.name: Check cpolar
entries.cpolar.description: Check whether cpolar is installed and has an auth token configured.
entries.cpolarStart.name: Start cpolar Tunnel
entries.cpolarStart.description: Start the local mobile gateway and generate a public access link through cpolar.
messages.ready: Plugin is ready. The sharing entry has not started.
messages.qrRotated: QR code rotated. The old link is no longer valid.
messages.tailscaleReady: Tailscale is installed and signed in.
messages.tailscaleNeedsLogin: Tailscale is installed, but sign-in was not confirmed.
messages.tailscaleFunnelStarted: Tailscale Funnel access entry is enabled.
messages.cpolarReady: cpolar is installed and an auth token is configured.
messages.cpolarNeedsAuth: cpolar is installed, but no auth token was detected.
messages.idleStopped: No phone confirmed entry for {minutes} minutes, so the sharing entry was closed automatically.
messages.statusIdle: Mobile scan access is not running.
errors.bundledHashFailedUser: Bundled cloudflared.exe hash check failed. Please restore the plugin files.
errors.tunnelNotRunningRotate: The sharing entry is not running, so the QR code cannot be rotated.
errors.gatewayNoPort: Local mobile gateway failed to start: no listening port was assigned.
errors.gatewayNotStarted: Local mobile gateway has not started.
errors.startTimeout: Startup timed out before returning an access link.
errors.tailscaleNotReady: Tailscale is not ready. Confirm sign-in and finish the Funnel setup guide.
errors.tailscaleNoUrl: Could not generate a Tailscale Funnel access link.
errors.cpolarNotReady: cpolar is not ready. Confirm it is installed and an auth token is configured.
errors.cpolarTokenEmpty: Paste the cpolar auth token first.
errors.cpolarAuthFailed: Failed to save the cpolar auth token.
mobile.invalid.useQr: Use the full QR-code link from the plugin panel.
mobile.invalid.expiredFull: This link is no longer valid. Return to the desktop panel and rotate the QR code.
mobile.invalid.expiredShort: This link is no longer valid.
mobile.invalid.sessionExpired: The access session is missing or expired. Scan the QR code again.
mobile.page.title: N.E.K.O Mobile Access
mobile.page.heading: N.E.K.O Mobile Access
mobile.confirm.title: Confirm N.E.K.O Mobile Access
mobile.confirm.heading: Confirm N.E.K.O Mobile Access
mobile.confirm.body: You are accessing this computer through a temporary link. Confirm this is your own device before entering the mobile page.
mobile.idle.label: Idle auto stop
mobile.accessType.label: Access type
mobile.hint: If you do not recognize this entry, close the page and stop sharing from the desktop plugin panel.
mobile.cacheTip: Cache note: this temporary link may change to a new address each time sharing restarts. Your mobile browser may treat the new address as a new site and download resources again. If storage grows after use, clear the related temporary site cache or site data in browser settings.
